conflicts.description: Chapter 2 states the $14,000 move happened at 11:43 PM from emergency subaccount ending 9031, but Chapter 4 documentary records show 2026-08-28 morning transactions from Emergency Savings 8821: $10,000 transfer plus $4,000 cash withdrawal.
conflicts.canonical_value: Emergency Savings 8821 on 2026-08-28: $10,000 transfer at 06:12 AM to checking 4119 and $4,000 cash withdrawal at 06:34 AM.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 4 embeds timestamped records and drives downstream legal/financial causality, so it is more causally embedded and treated as canonical; Chapter 2 line is treated as inconsistent recollection.
